summary: Both inputs are minute positions within one 24-hour clock and a session spans at most 1439 minutes, so legal inputs cannot provide honest asymptotic runtime tiers.

workload_bound.source_constraint: login and logout are distinct minute positions in a 24-hour day

replacement_checks.evidence: The reference parses two fixed-width times and performs a fixed number of integer additions, divisions, comparisons, and subtractions.
The certificate regression checks all 2072160 distinct ordered clock-time pairs against an independent bisected interval-boundary oracle.
